name: Disable Delivery Optimization
description: Stops peer-to-peer Windows Update sharing with other PCs on your network/internet.

name: Disable Remote Registry
description: Prevents remote access to the registry — hardens the system against network attacks.

name: Disable Xbox Services
description: Disables all Xbox-related background services. Medium risk if you use Xbox app or Game Pass.

name: Disable Fax Service
description: Disables the Windows Fax and Scan service — safe on machines without fax hardware.

name: Disable Print Spooler
description: Disables the print spooler. Only use if no printer is attached. Also mitigates PrintNightmare.

name: Disable Bluetooth Support Service
description: Disables Bluetooth. Safe if you have no Bluetooth devices paired.

name: Disable Windows Media Player Network Sharing
description: Disables the WMP network sharing / DLNA streaming service.

name: Disable Touch Keyboard & Handwriting Service
description: Disables the touch keyboard service. Safe on desktops and non-touchscreen laptops.

name: Disable Secondary Logon
description: Disables the 'Run as different user' feature. Reduces attack surface.

name: Disable Windows Search Service
description: Disables Windows Search indexing service. Reduces background disk activity.

name: Disable Windows Themes Service
description: Disables visual theme rendering — use only on headless/server machines without a real GUI need.

name: Disable Connected Devices Platform (CDPSvc)
description: Disables the service used for cross-device experiences (Phone Link, clipboard sync, etc.). Safe if you don't use Windows cross-device features.

name: Disable AllJoyn Router Service
description: Disables the AllJoyn Router, a legacy IoT device connectivity bridge. Unused by standard desktop apps.

name: Disable Downloaded Maps Manager
description: Disables the service managing offline map downloads. Safe if you never use the Windows Maps app.

name: Disable Hyper-V Guest Integration Services
description: Disables Hyper-V heartbeat, VSS, shutdown and time-sync integration services. These run even on physical machines. Safe unless this machine is a Hyper-V guest VM.

name: Disable Diagnostics Hub Standard Collector
description: Disables the diagnostics data collection service used mainly by Visual Studio profiling. No effect on normal usage.

name: Disable Microsoft Edge Update Service
description: Disables automatic Edge browser updates. Safe if you manually manage Edge. Not recommended if Edge is your primary browser.

name: Disable Windows Biometric Service
description: Disables the biometric framework. Safe to disable if you do not use Windows Hello, fingerprint login, or any biometric authentication apps.

name: Disable Geolocation Service
description: Disables the Windows location platform that provides location to apps. Safe if you never use location-aware features.

name: Disable Windows Parental Controls Service
description: Disables the Windows Parental Controls service. Safe if you manage parental controls via other means or don't use them.

name: Disable Windows Camera Service
description: Disables the Windows Camera service (wmpcsvc). Safe if you don't use the Camera app or Windows Hello face recognition.

name: Disable Windows Defender SpyNet Membership
description: Disables joining Microsoft SpyNet — the community-based threat reporting network. Reduces cloud lookup overhead.

name: Disable Clipboard Service
description: Disables the Windows clipboard service and history. The basic clipboard still works (Ctrl+C/Ctrl+V). Restart required.

name: Disable Windows Update Automatic Updates Service
description: Sets the Windows Update service to Manual and disables automatic update checks. Use with caution — your system may miss critical security patches.

name: Disable Windows Insider Service
description: Disables the Windows Insider program service. Prevents Insider builds and associated background activity on non-Insider machines.

name: Disable COM+ System Application Service
description: Disables the COM+ system application service which manages Component Services. Required for some developer tools and certain system features — safe to disable on standard desktop machines.

name: Disable IP Helper (IPv6 Transition)
description: Disables the IP Helper service that provides automatic IPv6 tunnel connectivity. Safe to disable if you don't use Teredo, ISATAP, or DirectAccess.

name: Disable Phone Service
description: Disables the Phone Service that manages telephony on Windows 10/11. Safe to disable if you never make VoIP calls through the Phone app.

name: Disable Contact Data Indexing Service
description: Disables background indexing of contact data for the People app. Reduces disk activity on systems with many contacts.

name: Disable User Manager Service
description: Disables the User Manager service that manages multi-user sessions and appContainer restrictions. May break fast user switching.

name: Disable NVIDIA Container
description: Disables background NVIDIA Container processes that track GPU usage and telemetry. Safe to disable if you don't use GeForce Experience.

name: Disable Windows Search Diagnostics Collection
description: Disables the diagnostics collection for Windows Search. Search functionality remains intact.

name: Set Windows Update to Manual Only
description: Switches Windows Update to manual trigger — no automatic downloads or installs. You control when updates are checked. Check manually or via this app's Updates module.

name: Disable Automatic AppX Package Updates
description: Stops the Microsoft Store from automatically updating installed apps. Use with caution — security updates for Store apps will be skipped.
